name: Jarida
desc: Jarida (Jadx + Frida) is a Jadx GUI plugin that lets you trace and optionally patch Java method return values at runtime using Frida, directly from Jadx’s deco…
descFull: Jarida (Jadx + Frida) is a Jadx GUI plugin that lets you trace and optionally patch Java method return values at runtime using Frida, directly from Jadx’s decompiled view.
